title: Eastern Flatbread
description: A simple flatbread recipe inspired by the flavors of the Middle East. Perfect for snacking or as a side.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium-high heat.
Brush the flatbreads with a little butter on each side.
Place the flatbreads in the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden.
Serve warm, either on their own or topped with your favorite ingredients such as hummus, tabbouleh, or feta cheese.
